# CWE-497: debug handler exposes host environment to any caller.
lang: go
file: CWE-497-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"runtime"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func RegisterDiagnostics(r *gin.Engine) {
	r.GET("/diag/host", func(c *gin.Context) {
		hostname, _ := os.Hostname()
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
			"hostname": hostname,
			"env":      os.Environ(),
			"cpus":     runtime.NumCPU(),
			"goos":     runtime.GOOS,
		})
	})
}
